entities.name: Plane of Umbra
entities.description: creation_myth: In the beginning, before light and darkness were separated, there existed a realm known as the Plane of Umbra, where shadows coalesced into forms both wondrous and terrible. The first Shadowstealers emerged from this plane, wielding powers that allowed them to manipulate shadows as they pleased. However, with great power came great corruption, and the Shadow Council was formed to govern the use of shadow magic for the greater good. | planes_of_existence: ['Plane of Umbra', 'Materi

entities.name: Shadow Binding
entities.description: description: A dark ritual where Thaddeus Blackwood and his Shadow Council can bind souls to their will, transforming those who resist into living shadows. | how_it_differs_from_reality: Unlike traditional binding spells that affect only the body, Shadow Binding involves a spiritual connection between the soul of the victim and the wielder of the ritual. This forms an unbreakable link, ensuring total obedience and servitude. | narrative_consequences: Aria must be cautious of those who seem overl

entities.name: Shadow Caverns
entities.description: type: geography | climate: dark, damp, and often cold | terrain: network of narrow passages, deep underground caves, and hidden shadows | resources: Eclipse Crystals, powerful shadows, ancient secrets

entities.name: Shadow Weaving
entities.description: source_of_power: Shadows from the Plane of Umbra | cost_or_price: Energy, potential betrayal | hard_limitations: Each use drains user's energy; can be detected by those skilled in Shadow Binding | types_or_schools: ['Binding', 'Manipulation', 'Growth/Decay']

entities.name: Shadow Mastery
entities.description: ranks_or_stages: ['Apprentice', 'Initiate', 'Mentor', 'Guardian'] | training_method: Apprenticeship under a Mentor, rigorous physical and mental exercises in Shadow Caverns, theoretical studies of the Plane of Umbra. | breakthrough_conditions: ['Mastering the basic forms of Shadow Weaving', 'Successfully binding and controlling shadows for extended periods', 'Demonstrating the ability to manipulate light and shadow interplay'] | bottlenecks: ['The risk of losing control during advanced practices

entities.description: physical_traits: {'skin_tone': 'Pale', 'eye_color': 'Dark', 'hair_color': 'Black or dark brown'} | lifespan: 200 years | innate_abilities: {'shadow_mastery': 'Aldor possess an inherent ability to manipulate shadows, making them adept at stealth and deceit.', 'night_vision': 'Enhanced vision in low-light conditions.'} | cultural_tendencies: {'clan_structure': 'Strong clan-based community with a hierarchical structure.', 'traditions': 'Rituals of honor and betrayal are prevalent, reflecting the co

entities.name: Whisperer Serpent
entities.description: type: beast | habitat: Shadow Caverns, Whispering Grounds | danger_level_1to10: 8 | abilities: ['Shape-shifting into shadows', 'Blending with darkness', 'Manipulating shadows to create illusions']

entities.name: flora_unnamed
entities.description: Eclipse Blossom: ['plant', 'magical_properties: ["Absorbs shadow energy", "Releases light when needed"]', 'habitat: Shadow Caverns, Whispering Grounds', 'rarity: rare', 'uses_in_alchemy_or_medicine: ["Used to create protective talismans and potions"]["Serves as a warning system for impending danger"]', 'dangers: ["Potential misuse by those who wish to exploit their power"]', 'cultural_significance: Sacred to the Aldor, believed to hold secrets of protection against shadows']

entities.name: Eclipse Wraith
entities.description: type: spirit | origin_of_the_spirit: origin_of_the_spirit: The Eclipse Wraith is a manifestation of unfulfilled darkness, born from the manipulation of Eclipse Crystals by those who seek to control shadows. | behavior_pattern: The Eclipse Wraith preys on weak shadows and turns them into more powerful wraiths. It manipulates shadows to create illusions and shifts in the very fabric of the Shadow Caverns. | power_level: 7

entities.name: Ironclaw Village
entities.description: associated_race_or_nation: Aldor | core_values: ['Strength through unity', 'Self-reliance', 'Defense against shadows'] | customs_and_traditions: ['Annual Forging Festival', 'Apprentice Trials in the Forge', 'Council Meetings every full moon'] | art_and_music: ['Forge Symphony', 'Hammer and Anvil Poems']

entities.name: Eclipse Cult
entities.description: deity_or_philosophy_worshipped: Shadow's Hand | core_doctrine: The Shadow's Hand teaches that true power lies in the manipulation of darkness, using shadows to control and manipulate reality. | rituals_and_practices: ['Eclipse Rituals: Held during solar eclipses, these rituals involve binding souls to gain control over their powers.', 'Whispering Grounds Visits: Initiation ceremonies involving deep meditation in the Whispering Grounds to connect with shadow energy.'] | clergy_hierarchy: ['High W

entities.name: Ironclaw Village
entities.description: governance_type: Hierarchical Clan System | social_classes: ['Apprentice', 'Initiate', 'Mentor', 'Guardian'] | how_class_is_determined: Based on mastery of shadow-wielding abilities and community trust. Apprentices must prove their worth through rigorous training, while higher ranks are selected by the Council. | justice_system: The Ironclaw Council oversees justice, involving clan elders and respected Initiates. Punishments range from community service to exile for severe offenses.

entities.name: Aldorish
entities.description: spoken_by: Aldor, Ironclaw Village residents | script_type: Runescript | sample_words_and_meanings: {'Thaldir': 'Moonlight', 'Vaelin': 'Steel', 'Eldrid': 'Ironwood', 'Daran': 'Oak', 'Aldric': 'Silver'} | naming_conventions_for_people: {'prefixes': ['Thal-', 'Vael-', 'Eld-', 'Daran-'], 'suffixes': ['-iron', '-blade', '-forge', '-stone']}

entities.name: Eclipse Blossom Cult
entities.description: purpose: To cultivate rare plants from the Shadow Caverns that grant enhanced abilities. | leader: Mira Blackwood | membership_requirements: ['Knowledge of shadow manipulation', 'Ability to grow and care for Eclipse Blossoms'] | resources_and_power: ['Access to Shadow Caverns', 'Control over rare, power-enhancing plants']

entities.name: Ironclaw Village
entities.description: government_type: Hierarchical Clan System | ruler: Mira Blackwood (Thaddeus' daughter) | capital_city: Forgehold | territory_description: Ironclaw Village is a tightly-knit community of Aldor, centered around the ancient forge in Forgehold. The village is surrounded by Shadow Caverns and Whispering Grounds, with narrow passages and hidden shadows providing both resources and strategic advantages.

entities.name: Menhirian Hills
entities.description: primary_currency: Blackcoin | major_exports: ['Eclipse Crystals', 'Rare Shadows', 'Whisperer Serpent Venom'] | major_imports: ['Shadow Binding Materials', 'Advanced Shadow Manipulation Tools', 'Aldorish Runescript Manuscripts'] | wealth_distribution: {'elite_factions': 'Thaddeus Blackwood and his Shadowstealers control the majority of wealth', 'commoners': 'Ironclaw Village residents struggle to make ends meet, with limited access to resources'}

entities.name: Crop Marking System
entities.description: description: A method of using crop marks during specific seasonal changes to pass coded messages without drawing attention from the Shadowstealers or the Shadow Council. | who_invented_it: Eldrid Thorne and Thorn Windclay | who_controls_it: Ironclaw Village | military_applications: None directly, but can be used for strategic coordination in times of conflict by passing critical information through marked crops.

entities.name: Shadowforge
entities.description: type: ancient ruins | builder: Aldor | age: 500 | original_purpose: An ancient forge used by the Aldor to craft powerful weapons and tools, and a place of dark rituals.

entities.name: Eclipse Blade
entities.description: type: weapon | creator: Aldor Smithsmith | power_description: Infused with shadow energy from the Plane of Umbra, the Eclipse Blade allows its wielder to manipulate darkness and bind souls. The blade itself is a masterful creation, blending iron and a rare Eclipse Crystal. | cost_of_use: Each use drains the user's energy; can be detected by skilled Shadow Binding practitioners

entities.name: Era of Shadows and Light
entities.description: era_name: Era of Shadows and Light | approximate_duration: 50 years | defining_events: The discovery of a hidden village called Ironclaw Village and the rise of Thaddeus Blackwood as the leader of the Shadowstealers. The era is marked by power struggles, secret societies, and the exploration of shadow manipulation. | major_figures: ['Thaddeus Blackwood', 'Mira Blackwood', 'Aldric Ironbender', 'Eldrid Thorne']

entities.name: Loyalty and Betrayal
entities.description: theme: Loyalty and Betrayal | how_expressed_in_world: Through the constant vigilance and hidden plots within the community, especially in Ironclaw Village. | which_characters_embody_it: ['Aria', 'Thaddeus Blackwood', 'Mira Blackwood'] | which_conflicts_explore_it: ['Aria’s journey to understand her powers while questioning the oppressive nature of Thaddeus and his Shadowstealers.', 'Internal conflicts among Ironclaw Village members, with some questioning their loyalty or allegiance.']

entities.name: The Forge of Shadows
entities.description: arc_name: The Forge of Shadows | type: Main Arc | act_structure: ['Aria discovers her true power in the Shadowforge Ruins', 'Aria faces betrayal within Ironclaw Village', 'Aria seeks allies outside the village to challenge Thaddeus Blackwood'] | chapter_count_estimate: 36
